executive_summary: Platform is stable with all 9 verticals healthy, but we're in a quiet period. Yesterday saw 19 calls with a 5.3% booking conversion (1 booking), but zero optimizer activity across all verticals—agents haven't analyzed any calls or made improvements. This is unusual and needs investigation.

sections.title: Call Performance
sections.content:
**19 total calls** yesterday from 1 active client
- **18 inquiries, 1 booking** (5.3% conversion)
- **0 missed calls** — perfect answer rate
- **32s average duration** — quick interactions, likely initial contact
- No sentiment data captured

**Assessment:** Low volume but clean execution. Conversion rate is acceptable for this call mix, though we need more volume to establish meaningful trends.

sections.title: Agent Performance
sections.content:
**⚠️ ZERO optimizer activity across all 9 verticals**

- No calls analyzed
- No prompt improvements made
- No optimization reports generated

**This is a red flag.** Either:
1. Optimizer agents aren't running on schedule
2. Call data isn't reaching the analyzers
3. There's a pipeline issue preventing analysis

With 19 calls yesterday, we should have seen at least one vertical produce an optimization report.

sections.title: System Health
sections.content:
**All 9 verticals: HEALTHY**

✅ All prompts intact
✅ All rules files valid JSON
✅ Template variables preserved
✅ Backups current

**Verticals:** electrical, general-contractor, hvac, marketing, medspa, onboarding, plumbing, roofing, sales

No broken files, no corruption, no structural issues. The infrastructure is solid—just not being utilized by optimizers.

sections.title: Email & Invoicing
sections.content:
**Email:** 0 sent in last 24h
**Invoices:** 0 total, $0 outstanding

**Status:** Nothing to report. Either we're between billing cycles or this client is on a different payment arrangement.

sections.title: New Verticals
sections.content:
**0 new verticals** created in the last 7 days.

Our vertical library remains at 9. No expansion activity from the creator agent.

action_items: 🔴 URGENT: Investigate why optimizer agents produced zero reports despite 19 calls—check scheduler, data pipeline, and agent logs
Review single active client account—is this expected volume or are we in a trial/onboarding phase?
Verify optimizer agent cron jobs are running and have proper access to call data
